headline: Meat processor Barra Mansa selects Amcor for vacuum sealing system
summary: Amcor supplied Moda Vac high-speed equipment, packaging materials and local technical support for the installation.

headline: Is Amcor Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Amcor has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain somewhat bullish about the stock’s outlook.
